title: Luffy Turns Toward Wapol
description: On pages 16–19, this part focuses on luffy turns toward wapol, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Luffy Turns Toward Wapol. Chopper fights Chessmarimo with the power of the Rumble Ball while the struggle for Drum Castle intensifies. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: fix the name to the boss. If he doesn't like it, we fight, or I rename it.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: write a "name" on a blank piece of paper.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: think about what will actually go in the chapter.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Talk to the people at jump about what will be in the next chapter.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's already complete a full month before it's available in stores. The end.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Draw the cover pages and make the sbs.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Now I talk with the high-tech boss y-san about the cover of the book and how to color it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Call the assistants over to my house, and we go nuts for 2 or 3 days. We draw the master copy.

summary: This part highlights luffy turns toward wapol and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
